gm_commands.name: bnetaccount create
gm_commands.description: Create a new Battle.net account. Must be run from the worldserver console.

gm_commands.name: account set gmlevel
gm_commands.description: Set GM level for an account. Levels: 0=player, 1=mod, 2=GM, 3=admin. Use -1 for all realms.

gm_commands.name: .character level
gm_commands.description: Set a character's level directly to the specified value.

gm_commands.name: .levelup
gm_commands.description: Increase your character's level by the specified amount.

gm_commands.name: .modify speed
gm_commands.description: Change your movement speed multiplier (1 = normal, 10 = very fast).

gm_commands.name: .modify fly
gm_commands.description: Change your flying speed multiplier.

gm_commands.name: .modify money
gm_commands.description: Add or remove gold. Amount is in copper (10000 = 1 gold). Use negative values to remove.

gm_commands.name: .revive
gm_commands.description: Resurrect the targeted player or yourself if no target is selected.

gm_commands.name: .die
gm_commands.description: Kill the currently targeted unit.

gm_commands.name: .freeze
gm_commands.description: Freeze a player in place, preventing all movement and actions.

gm_commands.name: .unfreeze
gm_commands.description: Unfreeze a previously frozen player.

gm_commands.name: .gm on
gm_commands.description: Enable GM mode, making you invisible to normal players.

gm_commands.name: .gm fly on
gm_commands.description: Enable GM flying without requiring a mount.

gm_commands.name: .tele
gm_commands.description: Teleport to a named location (e.g., .tele stormwind). Use .lookup tele to search.

gm_commands.name: .go xyz
gm_commands.description: Teleport to exact world coordinates on the specified map.

gm_commands.name: .appear
gm_commands.description: Teleport yourself to the specified player's location.

gm_commands.name: .summon
gm_commands.description: Summon the specified player to your current location.

gm_commands.name: .additem
gm_commands.description: Add the specified item to your inventory. Count defaults to 1 if omitted.

gm_commands.name: .additemset
gm_commands.description: Add every item from a complete item set to your inventory.

gm_commands.name: .npc add
gm_commands.description: Spawn a creature permanently at your current location.

gm_commands.name: .npc delete
gm_commands.description: Delete the currently targeted creature from the world and database.

gm_commands.name: .npc set model
gm_commands.description: Change the targeted NPC's display model to the specified display ID.

gm_commands.name: .npc info
gm_commands.description: Display detailed information about the targeted NPC including entry, GUID, faction, health, and flags.

gm_commands.name: .gobject add
gm_commands.description: Spawn a game object permanently at your current location.

gm_commands.name: .gobject delete
gm_commands.description: Delete the currently targeted game object.

gm_commands.name: .gobject near
gm_commands.description: List all game objects within the specified distance in yards (default 10).

gm_commands.name: .lookup item
gm_commands.description: Search for items by name. Returns matching item IDs.

gm_commands.name: .lookup spell
gm_commands.description: Search for spells by name. Returns matching spell IDs.

gm_commands.name: .lookup creature
gm_commands.description: Search for creatures by name. Returns matching creature IDs.

gm_commands.name: .lookup area
gm_commands.description: Search for areas and zones by name.

gm_commands.name: .lookup tele
gm_commands.description: Search for available teleport destination names.

gm_commands.name: .learn
gm_commands.description: Permanently teach yourself the specified spell.

gm_commands.name: .cast
gm_commands.description: Cast a spell on yourself or your current target.

gm_commands.name: .aura
gm_commands.description: Apply a persistent aura to yourself.

gm_commands.name: .unaura
gm_commands.description: Remove a specific aura, or use .unaura all to remove all auras.

gm_commands.name: .quest add
gm_commands.description: Add a quest to your quest log.

gm_commands.name: .quest complete
gm_commands.description: Force-complete a quest, marking all objectives as done.

gm_commands.name: .display
gm_commands.description: DraconicWoW transmog and appearance display system. Per-slot visual overrides for roleplay outfits.

gm_commands.name: .effect
gm_commands.description: DraconicWoW visual spell effect management. Apply persistent SpellVisualKit effects to your character.

gm_commands.name: .wmorph
gm_commands.description: DraconicWoW morph command. Transform your character into any creature model. Persists through logout.

gm_commands.name: .wscale
gm_commands.description: DraconicWoW scale command. Change your character's visual size. Persists through logout.

gm_commands.name: .remorph
gm_commands.description: DraconicWoW remorph command. Reapply your saved morph appearance after login or zoning.

gm_commands.name: .cnpc
gm_commands.description: DraconicWoW custom NPC system. Create and manage NPCs with player-race appearances and custom equipment.

gm_commands.name: .prof
gm_commands.description: DraconicWoW profession management. Learn, unlearn, max, or reset professions instantly.

gm_commands.name: .bestiary
gm_commands.description: DraconicWoW creature spell/aura sniffer. Records creature spells and auras in real-time for documentation.

gm_commands.name: .comp
gm_commands.description: DraconicWoW companion squad system. Manage AI-controlled NPC party members with role-based AI (tank, healer, DPS).

gm_commands.name: .server info
gm_commands.description: Display server uptime, connected player count, and build information.

gm_commands.name: .server restart
gm_commands.description: Schedule a server restart with a countdown broadcast to all players.

gm_commands.name: .server shutdown
gm_commands.description: Schedule a server shutdown with a countdown broadcast to all players.

gm_commands.name: .reload all
gm_commands.description: Reload all server data tables from the database without restarting the server.

gm_commands.name: .reload eluna
gm_commands.description: Reload all Eluna Lua scripts without restarting the server.
